productName: hashbreak - Pre Rolls (Infused) - Lemon Cherry Punch - 1g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Lemon Cherry Punch flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a bright, zesty lemon flavor, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience. Pace yourself.
